convergence.note: Each block re-zeroed at its basin over the wall region before differencing; a shrinking block-to-block |ΔF| is the metadynamics convergence signature.

recrossings.note: closed<->open crossings use a 5σ hysteresis deadband; many crossings / repeat druggable-window visits = diffusive, well-explored sampling.

orthogonal.corr_note: Pearson r of Rg vs the gate distance across frames. A clear positive r means the orthogonal descriptor CORROBORATES opening (both grow together) while being a distinct projection; |r|~1 would mean it is redundant with Rg.

reweight_2d.note: F(Rg, gate) via last-bias exp(+V/kT) reweighting of the biased frames; locates the opened state in BOTH coordinates. Written to fes2d_rg_gate.json + fes2d_rg_gate.png.

mdpocket_volume.note: mdpocket transient-pocket density grids written to OUTPUT_DIR; a volumetric orthogonal to the gate distance.
